channel.title: adolescence on DANIELLE COSME
channel.description: Recent content in adolescence on DANIELLE COSME

item.title: Neural correlates of self-evaluation during puberty
item.description:
Citation:
Barendse, M. E. A., Cosme, D., Flournoy, J. C., Vijayakumar, N., Cheng, T. W., Allen, N. B., & Pfeifer, J.H. (in press) Neural correlates of self-evaluation during puberty. Developmental Cognitive Neuroscience

item.title: Study protocol: Transitions in Adolescent Girls (TAG)
item.description:
Citation:
Barendse, M.E.A., Vijayakumar, N., Byrne, M.L., Flannery, J.E., Cheng, T.W., Flournoy, J.C., Nelson, B.W., Cosme, D., Mobasser, A., Chavez, S.J., Hval, L., Brady, B., Nadel, H., Helzer, A., Shirtclif, E.A., Allen, N.B., & Pfeifer, J.H. (2020) Study protocol: Transitions in AdolescentGirls (TAG). Frontiers Psychiatry, 10, 1018.
